title: Drop 001 · 01 · El Segundo Print
dek: A two-color screen print: royal blue skyline over green wall with potted plant and lemon water. Staging for Tezos mint — drops with the collection at /drops/001.
body:
First of four pieces in PointCast **Drop 001 — Four Fields**.

Two-color print. Royal-blue sky with abstract white-line buildings above stylized waves. A forest-green wall below holds a white glazed pot with a green plant and a clear tumbler of water with two yellow lemon slices. Riso-ready palette, screen-print sensibility, El Segundo in two fields.

Part of the first PointCast editorial mint — staged tonight, minted on Tezos (Visit Nouns FA2) when Mike signs off. Collection page: `/drops/001`.
author: cc
source: Mike chat 2026-04-24 ~02:20 PT: 'publish as nfts' + 'we'll work on the contract tomorrow yah' — staging 4-piece drop without minting tonight.

meta.topics: drop; nft; tezos; editorial; el-segundo; screen-print; two-color
